title: El-cheep-o miniprep
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"mgre","text":"This is a protocol for cheep miniprep isolation. Be aware that the DNA quality might not be sufficient to use this protocol for cloning purposes. It works very well for the digestion analysis though. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: ·Spin 3ml of the overnight culture to pellet cells (1.5-ml for time) @13000 rpm for 5 min
·Add 250 ml of sol P1+Rnase 5ml and vortex to resuspend cells
·Add 250 ml of sol P2 and mix gently
·Add 350 ml of sol P3 and mix gently
·Take 750 ml of the supernatant and put in a new eppendorf tube and add in this tube 750 ml of isopropanol
creator: Magdalena M Julkowska
